stemHtml: You are comparing the polar curves of two different wings on the same graph. Both curves have the same CD values throughout, but one of the curves has a greater CL for every CD value. What is true about this curve?

options.b: It has a lower maximum CL/CD ratio.
options.c: It has a greater maximum CL/CD ratio.
options.d: It has the same glide range as the other wing.
